name: 格斗
description: 以利爪进行高速近身格斗的武器类型，兼具攻击速度与机动性。
descriptionEn: A weapon type for high-speed close combat using claws, combining attack speed with mobility.

name: 桐丸
description: 咲里的异常伴生体桐丸，贪吃的奇异生物，与咲里协同作战。
descriptionEn: Sakiri's anomalous companion Kiroumaru, a gluttonous creature that fights alongside her.

name: 变形十字盾
description: 可变形的十字盾，能在攻防之间自由切换，适合攻防一体的战斗风格。
descriptionEn: A transforming cross-shield that freely switches between offense and defense for versatile combat.

name: 异能构装体
description: 操控多个异能构装体进行协同战斗，可同时应对多个目标。
descriptionEn: Controls multiple esper constructs for coordinated attacks against multiple targets.

name: 言灵之力
description: 以言灵之力构筑防御阵地，为队友提供强大的防护支援。
descriptionEn: Uses the power of incantations to build defensive formations, providing strong protection for allies.

name: 剑
description: 经典的剑术武器，以精准的剑技进行战斗。
descriptionEn: A classic sword weapon, engaging in combat with precise swordsmanship.

name: 唐伞刀
description: 唐伞形态的刀，收合时为伞、展开时为刀的变形武器。
descriptionEn: A katana disguised as a traditional umbrella, transforming between parasol and blade forms.

name: 液态弧光
description: 液态弧光武器，可灵活变形的远程支援武器。
descriptionEn: A liquid-type arc weapon, a flexible ranged support weapon that can reshape itself.

name: 载具
description: 战斗用载具，擅长高速移动和运输。
descriptionEn: Combat vehicle specialized in high-speed movement and transportation.

name: 杖剑与 Sunyas
description: 杖剑与伴生体 Sunyas 协同作战的复合战斗方式。
descriptionEn: A hybrid combat style using a cane sword alongside the companion Sunyas.

name: 影操控
description: 以影子操控进行战斗的异能，擅长从暗处发起攻击。
descriptionEn: An esper ability that manipulates shadows, specializing in attacks from the darkness.

name: 双刃
description: 双持短刃进行快速战斗，攻速极高。
descriptionEn: Dual-wielding short blades for extremely fast-paced combat.

name: 构装体
description: 操控构装体进行战斗，兼具攻击和支援能力。
descriptionEn: Controls constructs for battle, combining offensive and support capabilities.

name: 刃翼
description: 以刃翼为武器进行战斗，兼具飞行和攻击能力。
descriptionEn: Fights using blade wings, combining flight capabilities with offensive power.

name: 妖锤
description: 大型妖锤武器，攻击范围广，破坏力极强。
descriptionEn: A large yokai hammer with a wide attack range and devastating destructive power.
